name: Scott Spark RC 900 Pro 2018
description: Medium frame, HMX Carbon. Major overhaul: pivot bearings, bottom bracket, cassette 10-52, chain, headset bearings, jockey wheels. New Pirelli tyres set up tubeless. Needs nothing.

name: Vitus Escarpe 29er
description: Size Small. £400 recently spent on new: seat, handlebars, grips, stem, dropper post, wheels, tyres, chain, front axle, headset bearings, brake pads.

name: Trek Road Bike 2022
description: Size 54 medium. Very light use, mostly Zwift. Includes: Look Keo 2 Max pedals, Boardman pedals, Duotrap S, Coospo BC107 computer, bottle cages, Ravemen lights, Token clip-on aerobars.

name: Boardman Mountain Bike
description: Large frame, Pearl White. SRAM X5 27-speed, FSA Alpha Drive 44/32/22t chainset, SRAM PG 950 cassette. Suntour Raidon XC-LO R Air 120mm fork. Avid DB1 hydraulic disc brakes. Boardman E4P doublewall 27.5" wheels. Fantastic condition, very light use.
